assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Phase 1 includes comprehensive pre-flight checks with commands to verify current versions, cluster health, node status, and workload health

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Includes 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone us-west1-b --format="yaml(channels)" | grep -A 20 "REGULAR"' command to check available versions in Regular channel

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: Section 1.2 includes both kubectl metrics check for deprecated APIs and gcloud recommender insights command to identify deprecated API usage

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade (--master flag or --cluster-version)
assertions.reason: Phase 2.1 provides exact command 'gcloud container clusters upgrade CLUSTER_NAME --zone us-west1-b --master --cluster-version 1.33'

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Section 2.2 includes verification commands and specifies expected output: 'Control plane at 1.33.x, all kube-system pods Running'

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Sections 3.2 and 3.5 provide exact gcloud commands for upgrading both node pools to version 1.33, though it uses single-level upgrade rather than skip-level

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Sections 3.3 and 3.6 include multiple monitoring commands: 'watch kubectl get nodes', checking stuck pods, and monitoring upgrade operations

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.32→1.33) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: Provides direct 1.32→1.33 upgrade for both control plane and node pools, but does not offer skip-level node pool upgrade options

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Phase 4 includes comprehensive validation with commands to check node versions, pod health, kube-system pods, and application smoke tests

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: Includes comprehensive troubleshooting section with specific commands and emergency rollback procedures, including creating new node pools at old version
